prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-BLE-WF-SERRATEDBREADKNIFE-STD-FBA Product Type: KITCHEN_KNIFE Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Stainless Steel and Wheat Fiber Handle Kitchen Knives (Many Styles) (Bread Knife) Description: Slice through crusty sourdough loaves, soft sandwich bread, and even delicate pastries or cakes with ease, using this 7.75 inch serrated bread knife from Beille. A must have kitchen essentials item for any professional chef, home cook or baker, this serrated bread knife handles specific tasks that no other blade in the kitchen can manage quite as well.

Designed for clean, effortless cutting, this bread knife features a long, sharp stainless steel blade with finely honed serrations, that glide through even the toughest crusts, without crushing or tearing the interior. From artisan baguettes to homemade banana bread, every slice is neat, smooth, and bakery worthy!

The handle is crafted from wheat fiber, an innovative, sustainable alternative to plastic, offering a lightweight, ergonomic grip that’s comfortable to hold and easy to control. The bread knife’s balanced design makes it ideal for steady, even slicing, while the modern, natural texture adds a warm touch to any kitchen.

Durable, sharp, and dishwasher safe, this bread knife is as convenient as it is dependable. Whether you're preparing breakfast toast, cutting cakes, or serving up sandwich loaves, it delivers clean results every time: no shredding, no mess, just smooth, satisfying cuts.

Whether you're an everyday bread baker or a weekend brunch enthusiast, this modern and aesthetic bread knife is a countertop essential! Perfect for home bakers, everyday cooks, and anyone who appreciates a thoughtfully made kitchen essential, this serrated knife brings together precision, sustainability, and simplicity in one. Search Terms: bread knife; sourdough bread knife; serrated knife; stainless steel knife; wheat straw utensils; artisan bread; kitchen essentials; sustainable products; baking supplies; bread slicer; bread machine; stainless steel knife; meal food prep; knife set Features: - SERRATED BREAD KNIFE: Beille’s 7.75 inch bread knife features sharp, serrated edges that glide through crusty sourdough loaves, soft breads, cakes and more without tearing - WHEAT FIBER HANDLE: Crafted from a blend of sustainable wheat fiber and polypropylene, the lightweight handle offers a natural, textured grip that’s comfortable, ergonomic and better for the environment, eliminating the use of traditional plastics - STAINLESS STEEL BLADE: Built to last with a durable, corrosion resistant stainless steel blade that maintains its edge; designed for long lasting sharpness and performance, the sourdough bread knife’s blade measures 7.75 inches in length - STYLISH AND MODERN DESIGN: Style and sustainability meet here! Sleek, sharp and stylish, this 8 inch bread knife adds a clean, natural look to any kitchen; balanced and easy to handle, reducing hand fatigue and improving control during slicing - DISHWASHER SAFE: Designed for convenience, this bread knife is safe to clean in the dishwasher, making post meal and prep work clean up quick and hassle free === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 7.75 inch Serrated Bread Knife Stainless Steel

anthropic.title_differentiation: Wheat Fiber Handle, Dishwasher Safe, Sharp Serrations, Ergonomic Grip, Sustainable Design

openai.title_differentiation: Stainless Steel Serrated Blade, Wheat Fiber Handle, Dishwasher Safe, Clean Slicing For Bread Cakes And Pastries
